prompt: What are the top 5 most-activated analytics modules in the last 90 days? List each module's name, business function, activation count, and subscription revenue.
output:
The query has returned the top 5 most-activated analytics modules in the last 90 days:

| module_name | business_function | activation_count | subscription_revenue |
|-------------|-------------------|------------------|----------------------|
| Territory Performance Analyzer | Sales & Marketing | 13 | 217500.0 |
| Talent Retention Predictor | HR & People | 12 | 297000.0 |
| Order Fulfilment Tracker | Supply Chain | 11 | 126500.0 |
| IP Portfolio Analyzer | Research & Development | 10 | 250000.0 |
| Cash Flow Predictor | Finance | 9 | 161500.0 |

These figures represent activation counts (DISTINCT subscription/order IDs from non-cancelled orders in the last 90 days) and total subscription revenue (seats × unit_price) for each module.
